title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates 9 Claude Code plugins for faster development, including Caveman for output quality, Exa for web search, Firecrawl for web scraping, Compound Engineering for analysis, Higgsfield for MCP integration, and Anthropic plugins for skills, legal, design, and security. Tools like Morph and Codeburn enable model swapping and cost tracking for development.
